query:
SELECT mr.id, mr.title, mr.requested_by, mr.requested_date, mr.duration_minutes, mr.status,
  GROUP_CONCAT(mrp.user_id) as participant_ids
FROM meeting_requests mr
LEFT JOIN meeting_request_participants mrp ON mr.id = mrp.meeting_request_id
WHERE mr.id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM meeting_requests)
GROUP BY mr.id;
